source_doc.title: CrossTraffic Semantic Firewall - Core Constraints
source_doc.description: Five hard constraints demonstrating Knowledge Graph validation capability

semantic_firewall_constraints.name: Lane Width Constraint
semantic_firewall_constraints.rationale: Lane width affects driver comfort, safety, and capacity. Values outside this range are physically implausible or non-compliant.
semantic_firewall_constraints.error_message: VALIDATION ERROR: Lane width {value} ft violates constraint. Must be 9-12 ft per HCM Exhibit 15-8.

semantic_firewall_constraints.name: Shoulder Width Constraint
semantic_firewall_constraints.rationale: Shoulder width provides recovery area and affects FFS adjustment. HCM adjustment factors are defined only for 0-6 ft range.
semantic_firewall_constraints.error_message: VALIDATION ERROR: Shoulder width {value} ft violates constraint. Must be 0-8 ft per HCM/Green Book.

semantic_firewall_constraints.name: Horizontal Alignment Class Constraint
semantic_firewall_constraints.rationale: Horizontal class is a discrete classification (0=tangent to 5=severe curve) used in speed-flow calculations. Invalid values break the methodology.
semantic_firewall_constraints.error_message: VALIDATION ERROR: Horizontal class {value} is invalid. Must be 0-5 per HCM Exhibit 15-22.

semantic_firewall_constraints.name: Passing Type Constraint
semantic_firewall_constraints.rationale: Passing type determines segment capacity: 0=Constrained (no passing), 1=Passing Zone, 2=Passing Lane. These are the only valid configurations.
semantic_firewall_constraints.error_message: VALIDATION ERROR: Passing type {value} is invalid. Must be 0 (Constrained), 1 (Zone), or 2 (Lane).

class_descriptions.1: Passing Zone - Passing permitted in designated zones
class_descriptions.2: Passing Lane - Dedicated passing lane provided

semantic_firewall_constraints.name: Speed-Curvature Compatibility Constraint
semantic_firewall_constraints.rationale: Curve radius must be adequate for design speed to prevent vehicle rollover. This is a physics-based safety constraint.
semantic_firewall_constraints.error_message: VALIDATION ERROR: Design radius {radius} ft is too small for speed limit {speed} mph. Minimum radius: {min_radius} ft per Green Book Table 3-7.

steps.action: Query Knowledge Graph for applicable constraints
Evaluate each constraint against input values
If ANY constraint fails → REJECT with error message
If ALL constraints pass → Forward to Rust Computational Core

experiment_design.hypothesis: The Knowledge Graph catches invalid inputs that a pure RAG/LLM would miss
experiment_design.method: Feed 50 adversarial queries (25 valid, 25 invalid) to both systems

expected_result.crosstraffic: 100% detection of constraint violations with specific error messages
expected_result.baseline_rag: Hallucination or generic error for many invalid inputs
